    16. orElseThrow(Supplier)
    17. orThrow()

Interface Option<T>

Type Parameters:
T - the contained value type
All Known Implementing Classes:
Empty, Present
public sealed interface Option<T> permits Present<T>, Empty<T>
A sum type representing the presence or absence of a value, as a null-safe alternative to Optional.

Option is:

  • A functor: map(CheckedFunction) transforms the contained value.
  • A monad: flatMap(CheckedFunction) chains operations that may not produce a value, short-circuiting on Empty.
Since:
1.0.0
Author:
Igor Flakiewicz
API Note:
Unlike Optional, Option is a sealed type with explicit Present and Empty cases, improving the pattern matching experience.
